questions.prompt: Vehicle make
Vehicle model
Model year (4-digit year)

categories.label: Engine
categories.description: Worksheet rows with Assessment → pointValue and Description → checkbox prompt (Engine).

questions.prompt: Reprogrammed Factory Trim (includes ROM chips) ECU, naturally aspirated engine
Non-Factory Trim ECU, naturally aspirated engine
Reprogrammed Factory Trim (includes ROM chips) ECU, forced induction engine air/fuel change only. If applicable, additional points must be added for an increase in boost.
Non-Factory Trim ECU, forced induction engine engine air/fuel change only. If applicable, additional points must be added for an increase in boost.
Turbo Boost increase <50%
Turbo Boost increase >50%
Non-Factory Trim/modified air intake before the throttle body
Non-factory trim/modified headlight to allow increased or cooler air flow to engine air intake, unless already taking one point for cold air intake.
Non-Factory Trim/modified throttle body
Non-Factory Trim/modified fuel delivery system, except fuel pump(s) (i.e. fuel injectors, fuel rails, fuel regulators)
Non-Factory Trim/modified intake manifold 1-6 cylinder engines, including manifold porting
Non-Factory Trim/modified intake manifold 7-12 cylinder engines, including manifold porting
Water-alcohol injection System
Non-Factory Trim/modified supercharger or turbocharger, any location
Non-Factory Trim/modified supercharger pulley
Non-Factory Trim/modified boost controller or vacuum lines that control boost
Non-Factory Trim/modified wastegate, wastegate actuator
Non-Factory Trim/modified intercooler
Non-Factory Trim/modified intercooler pipes only
Non-Factory Trim/modified camshafts, rocker arms, pushrods, or cam gears that adjust cam timing or lift
Ported/polished Factory Trim cylinder heads
Non-Factory Trim cylinder heads
Non-Factory Trim/modified engine intake/exhaust valves
Increased displacement by more than 1%
Increase compression ratio by .50 or less
Increase compression ratio greater than .50
Dry sump engine oil system
Non-Factory Trim/modified header 1-6 cyl (pre-cat exhaust change)
Non-Factory Trim/modified header 7-12 cyl (pre-cat exhaust change)
Non-Factory Trim/modified exhaust beyond the catalytic converter (e.g. cat back exhaust)
Non-Factory Trim/modified catalytic converter(s)
Complete removal or “gutting” of OEM catalytic converter(s) (i.e. “test pipe” in place of catalytic converter)
Non-Factory Trim/modified power steering, crank pulley
Non-Factory Trim/modified/deleted engine or accessory fan and/or other engine accessories not otherwise listed
Street Port, rotary engines
Bridge Port, rotary engines
Peripheral Port, rotary engines
Non-Factory Trim/modified Pistons, Rods
Vehicles tuned and running ethanol content greater than 15%. (E.g. a vehicle tuned to run on e85)
Any type of commercially available gasoline or diesel fuel
Non-Factory Trim/modified fuses, relays, wiring, or addition of Power Distribution Modules
Non-Factory Trim hoses, belts, clamps
Non-Factory Trim air or fuel filters
Non-Factory Trim radiator
Non-Factory Trim battery, starter motor, alternator, spark plugs, spark plug wires, ignition coils
Non-Factory Trim/modifications to oil system
Non-Factory Trim/modifications/number of fuel pumps

Non-Factory Trim/modified muffler tips/components designed strictly for the purposes of reducing sound with no measurable or theoretical performance advantage (e.g. exhaust tip turn-down or second muffler)
Factory specification engine rebuild and head shave
Accessories and/or gauges

For engine swaps or elective dyno based classing, competitor must provide peak horsepower figure to the Steward for evaluation; Scrutineer may request supporting documentation at the Steward’s discretion
Select Crank HP or Wheel HP Dyno measurements
Select 2WD or AWD
Starting with the 2018 season Dynojet is the only official dyno measurement
Scaled result using 2/3 HP + 1/3 Torque + Drivetrain loss
Number of points above base car assessment
Using Engine Points Total

categories.label: Drivetrain
categories.description: Worksheet rows with Assessment → pointValue and Description → checkbox prompt (Drivetrain).

questions.prompt: Non-Factory Trim sequential gearbox
Non-Factory Trim non-sequential (H pattern) Dogbox gearbox
Dual clutch transmission - DSG, DCT, PDK, etc
7 speed or more automatic transmission - GM HydraMatic 10L90 and 10L80, Ford 10R80, ZF HP8, Mercedes 7G-Tronic etc
Automated single clutch manual transmission - SMG, Ferrari F1, Lambo E-Gear etc
Manual tranmission with factory autoblip (Nissan 370Z, BMW M2, C7 Corvette, Porsche) or aftermarket add-on
5 or 6 speed manual transmission
3 or 4 speed manual transmission
Automatic transmission with 6 speeds or less
CVT Transmission
Non-Factory Trim/modified final drive ratio
Non-Factory Trim/modified LSD if vehicle is equipped with LSD from the factory or was a factory option
Non-Factory Trim/modified LSD if vehicle is not equipped with LSD from the factory or was not a factory option
Non-Factory Trim/modified traction control (ie via Non-Factory Trim ECU mapping)
Non-Factory Trim/modified electronically controlled center differential mapping (ie GEMS center diff controller for Mitsubishi Evo, Subaru STi)
Non-Factory Trim/modified half shafts or driveshafts including carbon fiber and aluminium driveshafts
Relocation of transmission location via altered mounts
Non-Factory Trim/modified clutch, pressure plate, and/or clutch assembly
Non-Factory Trim/modified flywheel
Non-Factory Trim/modified motor, transmission, differential, and/or other drivetrain mounts, including metallic and non-metallic mounts
Non-Factory Trim/modified shifter, including bushings, lever, etc.
Enabling or disabling of Factory Trim traction control

categories.label: Suspension
categories.description: Worksheet rows with Assessment → pointValue and Description → checkbox prompt (Suspension).

questions.prompt: Non-Factory Trim non-adjustable shocks, struts, dampers
Non-Factory Trim 1-way adjustable shocks, struts, dampers
Non-Factory Trim 2-way adjustable shocks, struts, dampers
Non-Factory Trim 3-way (or more) adjustable shocks, struts, dampers
Non-Factory Trim shocks, struts, dampers with piggyback canister or external remote canister – note: must also take points for shocks/struts/dampers as listed above
Non-adjustable non-Factory Trim coil springs, leaf springs, or torsion bars (or non-modified factory height adjustment)
Height adjustable non-Factory Trim coil springs, leaf springs, or torsion bars (or springs with modified factory height adjustment)
Torsion bar to coil spring conversion
Non-Factory Trim sway bars
Non-Factory Trim engine bracing (not including motor and other drivetrain mounts)
Non-Factory Trim/Modified Control Arms or Non-Factory Trim/Modified Trailing or Camber Arms of different dimensions than Factory Trim
Modification of wishbone suspension upright
Non-Factory Trim subframe that does not alter suspension geometry
Non-Factory Trim/modified Watts Link
Non-Factory Trim/modified panhard bar
Non-Factory Trim torque bar
Modify OEM torque bar
Non-Factory Trim suspension bushings or spherical bearings, except rubber or polyurethane , except for spherical bearings in strut or shock top mounts

Non-Factory Trim/modified suspension components which enable alignment settings beyond Factory Trim capability (does not apply to coil springs, leaf springs, or torsion bars); note - additional points may need to be taken for specific non-Factory Trim suspension components if listed elsewhere in this section
Non-Factory Trim bracing, including strut/shock tower brace, chassis brace(s) (e.g. X-brace or cross-bar)

Custom Alignment settings, including caster, camber, or toe, regardless of factory recommendations; note: modifications to Factory-trim suspension components for the purposes of alignment adjustment must be assessed separately
Non-Factory Trim suspension bushings, either rubber or polyurethane
Non-Factory Trim suspension bushing limiters of any material; note - points must also be taken for bushing material, if applicable
Removal of swaybars
Non-Factory Trim sway bar endlinks
Non-Factory Trim eccentric camber bolts
Non-Factory Trim camber adjusting ball joints
Modified steering rack from power assist to manual or manual to power assist
Suspension re-enforcement provided by installation of roll bar or roll cage that adheres to requirements listed in the Car Requirements section of the rules
Disabling or enabling of Factory Trim Electronic Stability Control systems

categories.label: Brakes
categories.description: Worksheet rows with Assessment → pointValue and Description → checkbox prompt (Brakes).

questions.prompt: Non‐Factory Trim brake calipers, drums, and/or rotors of a different size ‐ front, rear or both
Non-Factory Trim/modified ABS (e.g. Bosch Motorsport ABS)
Disabling any and all factory and/or aftermarket ABS or competing in a vehicle not originally equipped with ABS
Non-Factory Trim rotors of the same type and shape as OEM
Non-Factory Trim rotors of the same thickness and diameter as Factory Trim, including swap from one-piece to two-piece rotors
Non-Factory Trim brake pads or shoes
Non-Factory Trim/modified brake lines
Non-Factory Trim/modified brake ducting
Enabling or use of Factory Trim ABS
Non-Factory Trim drilled or slotted rotors of the same shape and size as OEM
Modified, re-located, or non-Factory Trim brake brakets

categories.label: Exterior
categories.description: Worksheet rows with Assessment → pointValue and Description → checkbox prompt (Exterior).

questions.prompt: Non-Factory Trim/modified front bumper/air dam/spoiler
Non-Factory Trim/modified front splitter, in addition to bumper/air dam/spoiler
Non-Factory Trim/modified front splitter that extends more than 3.5 inches from front bumper skin leading edge, in addition to bumper/air dam/spoiler
Non-Factory Trim/modified canards (each set assessed points front or rear)

Non-Factory Trim Rear spoiler or wing including any airfoil that in no way protrudes more than 6” from the mounting location of the spoiler or wing, does not exceed the height of the vehicle, and does not extend beyond the width of the rear quarter panels.

Non-Factory Trim Rear spoiler or wing including any airfoil that does not exceed the height of the vehicle, does not extend beyond the width of the rear quarter panels, and does not extend no more than 6" beyond the skin of the rear bumper
Non-Factory Trim Rear spoiler or wing including any air foil of any size or shape
Non-Factory Trim hardtop of different shape and size which alters airflow aft of the OEM rear glass (eg CWest Honda S2000 aero hardtop)
Factory trim hardtop or Non-Factory Trim hardtop of the same shape and size of OEM hardtop
Non-Factory Trim/modified vortex generator to roof, hardtop, rear glass or trunk
Non-Factory Trim/modified flat bottom
Non-Factory Trim/modified rear diffuser
Non-Factory Trim/modified side skirts
Non-factory trim Active aero, i.e. moveable aero devices; points assessed for each piece, in addition to assessment points listed above (set number of pieces below)

Front Underbody Tray that does not extend in front of the front bumper skin, beyond the width of the front quarter panels, or more than 18" behind the front axle; note – points for front splitter, bumper, spoiler, air dam, and flat bottom assessed separately
Non-Factory Trim/modified fenders
Non-Factory Trim/modified doors
Non-Factory Trim/modified trunk lid
Non-Factory Trim/modified rear bumper
Non-Factory Trim/modified hood
1 COM supplied sticker on each side of the vehicle that is easily visible from the outside (2 stickers minimum)
Non-factory trim Active aero, i.e. moveable aero devices; 4 points assessed for each piece, in addition to assessment points listed above

categories.label: Weight
categories.description: Weight worksheet uses a different layout than modification tables; keep structured weight fields.

questions.prompt: Showroom base weight (lbs)
Competition weight (lbs)
Ballast amount (lbs)

categories.label: Tires
categories.description: Tire class and model flow with assessment points on tire options.

questions.prompt: Tire class
Specific tire
Primary tire width (mm)
Manual tire points (if assessment unclear)
